nodes.name: Schedule: Mon & Wed 8PM
nodes.notes: Triggers every Monday and Wednesday at 8:00 PM

nodes.name: Fetch RSS & Extract Topics
nodes.notes: Fetches RSS feeds from cybersecurity sources and extracts trending topics

nodes.name: Select Document (Intelligent)
nodes.notes: Matches trending topics with available documents, selects best match

nodes.name: List Files in Selected Folder
nodes.notes: Lists all files in the selected document folder

nodes.name: Parse & Select File
nodes.notes: Extracts file list and selects first .md or .docx file

nodes.name: Download File
nodes.notes: Downloads the selected file content (non-destructive, read-only)

nodes.name: Extract File Content
nodes.notes: Extracts text content from downloaded file

nodes.name: Generate LinkedIn Post (Claude)
nodes.notes: Uses Claude to transform content into engaging LinkedIn post

nodes.name: Extract Generated Post
nodes.notes: Extracts the generated post text from Claude's API response

nodes.name: Send Telegram Approval Request
nodes.notes: Sends post to Telegram with Approve/Reject buttons

nodes.name: Wait for User Decision
nodes.notes: Waits for user to click Approve or Reject button

nodes.name: Check if Approved
nodes.notes: Routes to approved or rejected path

nodes.name: Save Approved Post
nodes.notes: Saves approved post to Published folder

nodes.name: Mark Document as Used
nodes.notes: Adds folder to processed_files.txt to prevent reuse

parameters.text:
=✅ *POST APPROVED & SAVED*

Your LinkedIn post has been saved to:
📂 /Personal/LinkedIn/Published/

🎉 Ready to manually post to LinkedIn!

*Document:* {{$('Select Document (Intelligent)').item.json.folder}}

=❌ *POST REJECTED*

The post was not approved.

*Document:* {{$('Select Document (Intelligent)').item.json.folder}}

This document will remain available for future selection.
